_comment: Activepieces flow — import via Settings → Import Flow. ADR-002.
_spec: SPEC-015 / Spike 4 §3.2 — polls expansion_intent_signals every 30 min

input.query: SELECT posting_id, account_id, account_name, title, company, location, source, url, date_posted, description, first_seen_date, match_tier, matched_role, matched_industry, match_score, reasoning, outreach_suggestion, signals, work_arrangement FROM pulse.expansion_intent_signals WHERE processed_at IS NULL ORDER BY first_seen_date DESC LIMIT 100;

_operator_notes: 1. Import this file in Activepieces: Settings → Import Flow.
2. Create a PostgreSQL connection named 'pulse-postgres' pointing at the
3. Set env vars PULSE_API_URL (e.g. https://pulse-api.fly.dev) and
4. Enable the flow. The fallback poll loop in main.py also processes EIS
rows every 30 min, so ingestion works even before Activepieces is wired up.
5. On conflict: run_episode is idempotent (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING on
pulse.episodes.dedup_key), so duplicate deliveries are safe.
